title: Landed Commit Open Issue Reconciliation
goal: Detect open external tracker items that have checked-in archive or review evidence suggesting implementation already landed.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.outcome: #425 is the remaining broad issue-ingestion guardrail: detect checked-in or landed implementation evidence while tracker state remains open.
intent.constraints: Keep core planning provider-agnostic; compare checked-in residue with external evidence without calling GitHub or auto-closing issues.
intent.latitude: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.next_step: Archive this slice and close #425 after the milestone is pushed.
execution.proof: uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q -k "landed_open or intent_validation"; uv run pytest packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py -q; uv run ruff check packages/planning; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json

invariants: External trackers remain optional provider-agnostic evidence.
The package may report stale tracker evidence but must not auto-close upstream items.
